questionHtml: Taking the value for the variance given in (d) (ii) as a good approximation for the true variance, find the upper and lower bounds for the proportion of marked fish in the lake.

meta.title: Taking the value for the variance given in (d) (ii) as a good approximation for the true variance, find the upper and lower bounds for the proportion of marked fish in the lake.
